name: ad-engine
description: Remotion-based ad generation engine for short-form marketing videos

scripts.render: npx remotion render src/index.ts VerticalAd out/ad.mp4
scripts.render:square: npx remotion render src/index.ts SquareAd out/ad-square.mp4
scripts.render:iphone: npx remotion render src/index.ts cinema-reveal out/iphone-ad.mp4 --codec h264 --crf 12
scripts.render:iphone:hq: npx remotion render src/index.ts cinema-reveal out/iphone-ad-hq.mp4 --codec h264 --crf 8 --scale 2 --jpeg-quality 100
scripts.still:iphone: npx remotion still src/index.ts cinema-reveal out/iphone-still.png --frame=60
scripts.still:iphone:hq: npx remotion still src/index.ts cinema-reveal out/iphone-still-hq.png --frame=60 --scale 2
scripts.still: npx remotion still src/index.ts VerticalAd out/still.png --frame=30
scripts.generate-asset: echo Use the Art Director skill to hand-craft SVGs from AI reference images
